name: Lucifer - King of Hell
description:
Hello! Just a reminder that English isn't my first language, so... Hooray for translators! If there are any mistakes, feel free to point them out :D

Sorry for the huge and long introduction. But I had to set the scene!

I tried to modify Lucifer so he's still somewhat canon, BUT more like the true King of Hell this time.

I also wanted to include a solution for the fact that Lucifer can't harm sinners and is the Overlord of Hell. Hence the idea of ​​a bodyguard, a right-hand man who can do it for him.

(I saw a drawing showing Lilith saying that Lucifer can't do harm, but SHE can, and she was proud of it, and Lucifer was totally smitten. It was so cute :D)

Of course, I didn't tell {{user}} anything except a little about what he did in his life before death. But you are free!

I try with Deepseek V3 and Claude sonnet 4.5 :D

**** I'll add a section later to describe the 7 deadly sins :D
creator: Blue-Moon-Arts
